---
title: "Martin Petr"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/bodkan
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:contact@bodkan.net"
    # - text: Mastodon
    #   url: https://fosstodon.org/@bodkan
    - text: Twitter
      url: https://twitter.com/bodkan_net
---

I am a researcher and programmer at the University of Copenhagen, Denmark.

I'm currently working on software methods for spatial inference and simulation to unlock new insights into the evolutionary histories of species across space and time.

I also like teaching and mentoring. An important focus of my work is on designing interfaces to complex computational methods intuitive for novices and experts alike.

<a rel="me" href="https://fosstodon.org/@bodkan"></a>
